title: [ImportVerilog] Insert type conversion for variable initializer

features.name: array_variable_concat_initializer
features.description: Code should include an automatic logic array variable with a concatenation initializer that uses replication operators to fill array elements

features.name: replication_in_concatenation
features.description: Code should include replication operators inside concatenation used to initialize multi-dimensional array variables

features.name: array_type_mismatch_conversion
features.description: Code should include type conversion when initializing an array variable with a concatenation whose result type does not match the target array type
